prayer:
Approach the cryogenerator with reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's purifying light upon its frost-wreathed coils.
Chant the Litany of Clarity to beseech the Machine Spirit of the cryogenerator for purification from all impurities.
Anoint the cryo-chambers and conduits with sacred ablative fluids, expelling daemonic residues.
Initiate the purification cycle whilst reciting binaric psalms, sanctifying every frozen lattice.
Commune once more with the cryogenerator's awakened essence, confirming its ritual purity through auspex rites.

user_prompt: I need to a targeting the Tarantula sentry gun
prayer:
Kneel before the Tarantula sentry gun, beseeching the Omnissiah to align its targeting matrices.
Invoke the Rite of Targeting upon the Tarantula sentry gun, awakening its Machine Spirit's predatory gaze.
Calibrate the auspex arrays with sacred oils, chanting litanies of precision and wrath.
Test the targeting protocols through simulated auspex volleys, honouring the gun's vigilant spirit.
Seal the rite with the Canticle of Unerring Aim, ensuring the Tarantula sentry gun's lethal focus.

user_prompt: Critical: auto-senses array requires a maintenance
prayer:
Present mechadendrites to the auto-senses array, intoning the Maintenance Doxology to the Omnissiah.
Scrutinize each sensor node of the auto-senses array, anointing with conductive unguents for renewal.
Purge erroneous data-spirits via binaric exorcism, beseeching the Machine Spirit's steadfast vigil.
Realign optical and vox receptors through ritual calibration, invoking harmonious function.
Conclude the maintenance with verification canticles, affirming the auto-senses array's sanctified acuity.

Circumambulate the Chimera APC, reciting the Hymn of Endurance to rouse its Machine Spirit.
Commence maintenance upon the Chimera APC's treads and hull-plates, applying blessed lubricants.
Diagnose power relays and dozer blades with auspex litanies, purging wear and corruption.
Reinvigorate the promethium heart through consecratory oils, ensuring martial readiness.
Finalize with the Oath of the Chimera APC, binding its spirit in eternal service to the Omnissiah.

Gaze upon the panopticon with mech-ocular reverence, invoking diagnostics under the Omnissiah's gaze.
Initiate the Rite of Diagnostics across the panopticon's vigilant lenses and data-vanes.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the panopticon to reveal hidden flaws through binaric confession.
Anoint cogitator nodes with sacred myrrh, reciting canticles of clarity and revelation.
Affirm the panopticon's purity via confirmatory scans, sealing it in watchful sanctity.

user_prompt: Critical: grav chute requires an emergency procedure
prayer:
Seize the grav chute in urgent supplication, chanting the Emergency Procedure Invocation to the Omnissiah.
Deploy stabilizing runes upon the grav chute's emitters, expelling gravitic anomalies.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the grav chute with litanies of descent, commanding controlled deployment.
Test the emergency sequence through ritual simulation, anointing descent vanes with oils.
Conclude by binding the grav chute's spirit anew, averting peril in the Omnissiah's name.

user_prompt: The plasma caliver awaits a shutdown
prayer:
Approach the plasma caliver with solemnity, beseeching orderly shutdown from its volatile heart.
Intone the Shutdown Canticle over the plasma caliver, lulling its Machine Spirit to quiescence.
Cycle down the containment fields whilst anointing coils with cooling sacraments.
Purge residual plasma ghosts through binaric purgation, honouring the weapon's fiery essence.
Verify the plasma caliver's dormant sanctity with final auspex blessings.

user_prompt: The storm bolter awaits a loading
prayer:
Present munitions before the storm bolter, invoking the Loading Rite under Omnissiah's munificence.
Awaken the Machine Spirit of the storm bolter with chambering litanies of retribution.
Insert bolt casings into the storm bolter's magazines, sanctifying each with explosive prayers.
Cycle the loading mechanism through test volleys, beseeching flawless feed.
Seal the storm bolter's readiness with the Canticle of the Storm, primed for holy fury.

user_prompt: Urgent power relay a consecration needed
prayer:
Encircling the power relay, chant the Consecration Doxology to exalt its conductive purity.
Anoint the power relay's terminals with electro-sanctified oils, invoking the Omnissiah's current.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the power relay to channel untainted energies eternally.
Realign flux capacitors through binaric harmonies, purging dissonant surges.
Affirm the power relay's hallowed state with resonant verifications and final blessings.

Kneel at the multi-melta's forge-heart, beseeching the Charging Litany from the Omnissiah.
Initiate charging protocols upon the multi-melta, rousing its Machine Spirit with plasma hymns.
Infuse the capacitors with sanctified promethium, anointing vents against meltdown.
Monitor the charging surge through auspex vigil, intoning stabilizers.
Conclude with the Oath of the Multi-Melta, its maw aglow in destructive zeal.
